days.title: Arrival and Jewel Changi Experience
activities: Arrive at Changi Airport and explore Jewel Changi
Visit the HSBC Rain Vortex and Shiseido Forest Valley
Dinner at Jewel food court or restaurant
days.budgetNote: Start with arrival logistics; Jewel has free entry but some activities may cost extra.

days.title: Cultural Chinatown Exploration
days.weather: Hot and humid, 30°C, chance of afternoon showers (Seasonal estimate)
activities: Morning walk through Chinatown Heritage Centre
Visit Buddha Tooth Relic Temple and pagoda
Explore street art and shops at Pagoda Street
days.budgetNote: Most attractions in Chinatown are low-cost or free; budget for meals and souvenirs.

days.title: Northern Frontier and Local Life
days.weather: Thunderstorms likely in late afternoon, 29°C (Seasonal estimate)
activities: Visit Woodlands Town Park and Waterfall Garden
Explore local hawker centers in Woodlands for affordable dining
days.budgetNote: Budget-friendly day focusing on public parks and local food; transport costs apply.

days.title: Final Highlights and Departure Prep
activities: Visit Marina Bay Sands SkyPark (if budget allows) or walk around Gardens by the Bay
Shopping at Orchard Road or last-minute souvenirs
days.budgetNote: Remaining budget allocated for final shopping and potential paid attractions like Supertree Grove OCBC Skyway.

categories.name: Clothing
items: Light rain jacket or compact umbrella

categories.name: Toiletries & Health
items: Basic first aid kit (plasters, pain relievers)
Face mask (optional, for crowded areas or dust)

categories.name: Documents & Money
items: Small amount of local currency (SGD) for hawker centers

categories.name: Miscellaneous
items: Hat or cap for sun protection
